name: daily-strategy-health
description: Check trading engine is running, review overnight positions, flag any drawdown warnings

ticketTemplate.title: Daily Trading Health Check
ticketTemplate.body: Check: 1) systemctl status trading on ThinkPad (ssh thinkpad). 2) Review trading/journal/ for any overnight fills or assignments. 3) Check current positions vs. risk parameters in config/. 4) Flag any drawdown exceeding threshold. Status: PAPER mode only.

name: weekly-performance-review
description: Analyze weekly P&L, win rate, premium collected, and signal attribution

ticketTemplate.title: Weekly Trading Performance Review
ticketTemplate.body: Analyze trading/journal/ for the past 5 trading days: P&L summary, win rate (CSP fills that didn't assign), premium collected, any assignments (now in CC phase), signal attribution (which L1-L4 signals generated trades). Compare to prior week.

name: policy-signal-analysis
description: Manual trigger — analyze a specific policy signal for trading implications

ticketTemplate.title: Policy Signal Analysis — [Signal Description]
ticketTemplate.body: Analyze the provided policy signal using the wheel strategy framework. Identify: affected sectors, specific tickers to watch, CSP candidates (L1-L2 signals only), risk assessment. All output is EDUCATIONAL — not financial advice. Paper mode analysis only.
